Day 14 of helping my cat become pain-free 🤍 Today started off pretty good… Mac ate well, wanted cuddles, and seemed more comfortable during the day 🥹 But later that night his pain started getting worse again, and for the first time ever, I heard him meow in pain 😔 Cats are extremely good at hiding pain, so hearing that honestly broke my heart. I’m doing everything I can to keep him comfortable while we continue raising money for his full-mouth extraction. We’re currently $1300 away from getting him the surgery he needs to finally live pain-free 🤍 Thank you to everyone continuing to support, donate, comment, and share his journey. It truly means so much to us. #stomatitis #catsoftiktok #rescuecat #catdentalcare #catmom
